messages.content: You are a coding agent. Be concise and preserve exact file paths.
Inspect the repository and explain why tests are failing.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read a UTF-8 text file from the workspace and return its contents. Use this when exact source context is required.

parameters.title: ReadFileInput
parameters.markdownDescription: Read files only inside the workspace.

function.name: run_command
function.description: Run a shell command and return stdout, stderr, and the exit code.
